signatures.title: Signature Reference
signatures.shipExplainer: In ship mining the scan signature identifies the dominant mineral directly — one value, one mineral. Rocks additionally contain secondary minerals.
signatures.groundExplainer: For ground deposits the signature only indicates the size of the deposit — it does not identify the mineral. Each cluster is 100% one single mineral; which one depends on the location.
signatures.collisionNote: Note: signature 3000 is shared with capital wreck debris (890 Jump class) — context decides: planet surface = deposit, open space = debris.
signatures.oreGroundNote: The signature does not identify the mineral — check the location's mineral list instead.
